member.name: T:Hazina.Tools.Common.Models.DTO.PagedRequest
member.summary: Generic pagination request parameters for list endpoints. Use this in controllers to enable consistent pagination across all APIs.

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Common.Models.DTO.PagedRequest.PageNumber
member.summary: Page number (1-based index)

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Common.Models.DTO.PagedRequest.PageSize
member.summary: Number of items per page

member.name: F:Hazina.Tools.Common.Models.DTO.PagedRequest.MaxPageSize
member.summary: Maximum allowed page size to prevent abuse

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Common.Models.DTO.PagedRequest.SortBy
member.summary: Property name to sort by (optional) Example: "CreatedAt", "Name", "Id"

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Common.Models.DTO.PagedRequest.SortDescending
member.summary: Sort direction (true = descending, false = ascending)

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Common.Models.DTO.PagedRequest.SearchQuery
member.summary: Search/filter query (optional) Implementation depends on the specific endpoint

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Common.Models.DTO.PagedRequest.Normalize
member.summary: Validates and normalizes pagination parameters

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Common.Models.DTO.PagedRequest.Skip
member.summary: Calculates the number of items to skip for the current page

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Common.Models.DTO.PagedRequest.Take
member.summary: Returns the page size (for clarity in LINQ queries)

member.name: T:Hazina.Tools.Common.Models.DTO.PagedResponse`1
member.summary: Generic paginated response wrapper for list endpoints. Provides metadata about the current page and total results.
member.typeparam: The type of items in the list

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Common.Models.DTO.PagedResponse`1.Items
member.summary: The items for the current page

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Common.Models.DTO.PagedResponse`1.TotalCount
member.summary: Total number of items across all pages

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Common.Models.DTO.PagedResponse`1.PageNumber
member.summary: Current page number (1-based)

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Common.Models.DTO.PagedResponse`1.PageSize
member.summary: Number of items per page

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Common.Models.DTO.PagedResponse`1.TotalPages
member.summary: Total number of pages

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Common.Models.DTO.PagedResponse`1.HasPreviousPage
member.summary: Indicates if there is a previous page

member.name: P:Hazina.Tools.Common.Models.DTO.PagedResponse`1.HasNextPage
member.summary: Indicates if there is a next page

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Common.Models.DTO.PagedResponse`1.#ctor
member.summary: Creates an empty paged response

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Common.Models.DTO.PagedResponse`1.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.List{`0},System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a paged response with items and metadata

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Common.Models.DTO.PagedResponse`1.Create(System.Collections.Generic.List{`0},System.Int32,Hazina.Tools.Common.Models.DTO.PagedRequest)
member.summary: Creates a paged response from a PagedRequest

member.name: T:Hazina.Tools.Common.Models.Extensions.QueryableExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for IQueryable to simplify pagination and common query operations

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Common.Models.Extensions.QueryableExtensions.ToPagedResponseAsync``1(System.Linq.IQueryable{``0},Hazina.Tools.Common.Models.DTO.PagedRequest)
member.summary: Applies pagination to an IQueryable using PagedRequest parameters
member.returns: Paged response with items and metadata

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Common.Models.Extensions.QueryableExtensions.ToPagedResponse``1(System.Linq.IQueryable{``0},Hazina.Tools.Common.Models.DTO.PagedRequest)
member.summary: Applies pagination to an IQueryable (synchronous version)

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Common.Models.Extensions.QueryableExtensions.ApplySorting``1(System.Linq.IQueryable{``0},System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Applies dynamic sorting to a query based on property name

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.Common.Models.Extensions.QueryableExtensions.ToPaged``1(System.Linq.IQueryable{``0},Hazina.Tools.Common.Models.DTO.PagedRequest)
member.summary: Applies pagination without getting total count (more performant for large datasets)

member.name: T:HazinaStore.Models.ImageMetadata
member.summary: Metadata for images with LLM-generated descriptions and embeddings for semantic search

member.name: P:HazinaStore.Models.ImageMetadata.Filename
member.summary: Image file path (relative to project uploads folder)

member.name: P:HazinaStore.Models.ImageMetadata.Description
member.summary: LLM-generated natural language description of the image Example: "A black dog sitting on grass in a park, medium size, friendly appearance"

member.name: P:HazinaStore.Models.ImageMetadata.DetectedObjects
member.summary: Objects detected in the image (for filtering and search) Example: ["dog", "park", "grass", "tree"]

member.name: P:HazinaStore.Models.ImageMetadata.DetectedColors
member.summary: Dominant colors detected in the image Example: ["black", "green", "brown", "blue"]

member.name: P:HazinaStore.Models.ImageMetadata.DetectedScenes
member.summary: Scene classification (outdoor, indoor, nature, urban, etc.) Example: ["outdoor", "daytime", "park"]

member.name: P:HazinaStore.Models.ImageMetadata.Embedding
member.summary: Vector embedding for semantic similarity search

member.name: P:HazinaStore.Models.ImageMetadata.SourceDocument
member.summary: Source document if this image was extracted from PDF/DOCX Example: "document.pdf"

member.name: P:HazinaStore.Models.ImageMetadata.PageNumber
member.summary: Page number if extracted from PDF

member.name: P:HazinaStore.Models.UploadedFile.Tags
member.summary: Tags for categorizing and filtering documents Examples: "text", "image", "upload", "generated", "website", "webpage", "product"

member.name: P:HazinaStore.Models.UploadedFile.Description
member.summary: LLM-generated description for images or summary for text documents

member.name: P:HazinaStore.Models.UploadedFile.Status
member.summary: Processing status for automatic document processing workflow

member.name: P:HazinaStore.Models.UploadedFile.ProcessedAt
member.summary: Timestamp when processing completed (description generated, embeddings created)

member.name: P:HazinaStore.Models.UploadedFile.ProcessingError
member.summary: Error message if processing failed

member.name: P:HazinaStore.Models.UploadedFile.Type
member.summary: Content type classification for semantic search filtering

member.name: P:HazinaStore.Models.UploadedFile.ExtractedImages
member.summary: References to images extracted from this document (PDF/Office images)

member.name: P:HazinaStore.Models.UploadedFile.FileSize
member.summary: File size in bytes

member.name: P:HazinaStore.Models.UploadedFile.MimeType
member.summary: MIME type

member.name: P:HazinaStore.Models.UploadedFile.UploadedAt
member.summary: When the file was uploaded

member.name: T:HazinaStore.Models.ProcessingStatus
member.summary: Processing status for automatic document processing

member.name: T:HazinaStore.Models.ContentType
member.summary: Content type classification for filtering and search
